story.title: Time Reckoning
story.logline: When a reclusive scientist discovers a way to manipulate time, a rogue agent must prevent catastrophe by unraveling the tangled threads of the past.
themes: Consequences of playing with the timeline

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: Meet Dr. Elianore, a brilliant scientist struggling to come to terms with his groundbreaking discovery. We are introduced to the abandoned research facility where Elianore's work takes place.

acts.label: Inciting Incident
acts.description: Dr. Elianore's discovery attracts the attention of a rogue agent, Kael, who will stop at nothing to exploit the technology for his own gain. Elianore's world begins to unravel as he realizes the true extent of Kael's intentions.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: As Kael's actions escalate, Elianore must navigate the complex web of time travel to prevent catastrophic consequences. Kael's true motives are revealed, and Elianore must make a choice that will determine the fate of the timeline.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: The aftermath of Elianore's choice sets in motion a chain of events that will reshape the world forever. Elianore and Kael must come to terms with the consequences of their actions, and the true cost of playing with the fabric of time.

story.world: The world is a complex, interconnected web of time and space, where the smallest action can have far-reaching consequences.
